settings.title: Why RubyRadiance is unlike anything on your bathroom counter
settings.subtitle: The result? Your cleanser, your serum, your vitamin C, your retinol — every product you already own — works harder. Goes deeper. Delivers more.

settings.text: Because the best skincare tool is the one you actually use.
Out of sight. Out of mind. Never used.
Visible. Beautiful. Ready. Part of your daily ritual.

settings.heading: This was designed to live on your vanity. Not in a drawer.
settings.subtext:
Metamorphosis builds clinically driven devices that follow the science, not the trends. RubyRadiance is where that philosophy becomes something you hold in your hand every morning.
Metamorphosis doesn't follow beauty trends. It follows the science.

settings.question: 630nm red light reaches your dermis
settings.answer: The layer where collagen and elastin actually live. Published clinical research confirms that red light in the 630nm range penetrates the dermis and stimulates fibroblasts, increasing the production of collagen and elastin (PubMed Central). Your skin is being treated while you apply your serum. That's two jobs done simultaneously.

settings.question: Sonic vibration creates micro-channels in the skin's surface
settings.answer: Enhancing the absorption of serums, moisturizers, and other topical treatments, allowing them to penetrate deeper and work more effectively (BEAUTYPRO). Your expensive serum stops sitting on top and starts going to work.

settings.question: Clinical studies on 630nm LED
settings.answer: Clinical studies on 630nm LED show that after consistent use, treated subjects showed measurable improvements in skin complexion, reduced skin roughness, and increased intradermal collagen density confirmed by ultrasound imaging (Red Light Wellness).

settings.title: What the science says in plain English:
SCIENTIFICALLY TESTED & VERIFIED
settings.content: Every device is developed with advanced phototherapy research and verified by independent laboratories to meet the highest safety and performance standards.

settings.text:
Pioneering
Synergy skincare
settings.content: The world’s first duo to combine targeted Red Light and Sonic Vibration technology with Exosomes, this innovation delivers unmatched skin rejuvenation. By stimulating cellular activity and enhancing Exosome uptake, this luxurious pairing ensures more precise and effective delivery of potent molecules for visibly firmer, brighter skin.

settings.title: CLINICALLY EVALUATED VISIBLE RESULTS
settings.bottom_text: *Based on an independent 84 day clinical study with once daily use. Individual results may vary. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

settings.title:
SKINCARE ROOTED IN INNOVATION,
PROVEN BY SCIENCE

settings.text: "I am in love with my MagicMoon! My undereyes are tighter and smoother after just a few uses. The portable shape makes it the perfect traveling companion to give me a quick refresh and look instantly well-rested.....
settings.rte_content: "I am in love with my MagicMoon! My undereyes are tighter and smoother after just a few uses. The portable shape makes it the perfect traveling companion to give me a quick refresh and look instantly well-rested. I pop them on when I'm organizing around the house and also when I'm on the go. Super convenient and effective!"

settings.text: "I've never used a red light product in my life, but the fact that the MagicMoon is so easy to use and well researched, without me having to invest too much made them a 10/10 for me.  I recommend it!"

“I started using the LushLips every night as part of my nighttime routine. I have always been insecure about the small size of my lips, but even after only using these for a short time, my lips already look smoother and plumper!.........
settings.rte_content: “I started using the LushLips every night as part of my nighttime routine. I have always been insecure about the small size of my lips, but even after only using these for a short time, my lips already look smoother and plumper! They are so comfortable and easy to use, and I can’t believe they make such a difference in only 3 minutes. I can’t go an evening without using them now!”

settings.text: “I’ve been dealing with melasma and hyperpigmentation for a few years and recently took the plunge on laser facials and started using the red lights on areas I wanted to target in between sessions and have seen pretty incredible results so far!.
settings.rte_content: “I’ve been dealing with melasma and hyperpigmentation for a few years and recently took the plunge on laser facials and started using the red lights on areas I wanted to target in between sessions and have seen pretty incredible results so far! And I’m glad I found these MagicMoon as I can continue to use them as upkeep which is also way more affordable than laser.  The hydrogel MagicMoon eye patches are a great combo to use after the treatment, and I like to put them in the fridge for extra cooling effect, especially in the morning.  It’s a nice little selfcare routine ☺  I wish I started this sooner!”

settings.text: “The LushLips hydrogel mask is a game changer for my lips! It provides immediate hydration, leaving my lips feeling incredibly soft and smooth. I always use these when my lips are feeling dry or after being in the sun for a while!....
settings.rte_content:
“The LushLips hydrogel mask is a game changer for my lips! It provides immediate hydration, leaving my lips feeling incredibly soft and smooth. I always use these when my lips are feeling dry or after being in the sun for a while! The lip masks fit perfectly without slipping, unlike other lip masks I’ve tried that fall down my face. After just one use, my lips feel rejuvenated.”

Also, “SuperStar red light pimple patches are absolutely amazing! And this is unlike any other pimple patches, because you don’t have to leave it on for hours to see results! It significantly reduces the size and redness of my pimples right after use! It is so easy to use and the effective results have made it an everyday staple in my skincare routine.  I can’t believe how quickly it can clear up my skin! Also, it came in the cutest packaging and is so easy to bring with you anywhere you go! Definitely my new go-to pimple patch!”

settings.text: “The search for the perfect eye treatment is now over! Metamorphosis MagicMoon Eye Evolution is a game changer! Actually, it is a life changer! Nothing has come close to the remarkable results I’ve experienced in a short amount.....
settings.rte_content:
“The search for the perfect eye treatment is now over! Metamorphosis MagicMoon Eye Evolution is a game changer! Actually, it is a life changer! Nothing has come close to the remarkable results I’ve experienced in a short amount of time (a couple of weeks) and requires no needles, no downtime and can be done at any time of the day.  They are engineered with convenience in mind: rechargeable, easy to clean, small enough to fit into a makeup bag or handbag. I couldn’t be more thrilled with the results. I can stop wasting time and money with eye treatments, creams or procedures.  MagicMoon gives me the youthful, refreshed appearance I’ve always wanted in just 3 minutes per day!”

Also:  “Aging can do cruel things to a woman’s body.  Slight changes happen over time. One day, you look in the mirror and hardly recognize the face staring back at you.  This was the case with my lips.  Small lines and thinning set in, and being needle adverse, I thought I would just have to live with it.  LushLips has saved the day though!  Having personally experienced Magic Moons, I am sold on the company, so investing in LushLips was a no-brainer.  After 2 weeks, I can tell a difference! Small lines are disappearing, the corners of my mouth are softening and this is without any needles or downtime!  LushLips takes 3 minutes, is painless and revives my lips!”

settings.content: Everything you need to know about our skincare and light therapy innovations

settings.sub_text: Discover the art of transformation with our cutting-edge collection.  From the rejuvenating power of LEDs to deeply nourishing and targeted hydrogel masks and the sculpting precision of our lift kit, each creation is designed to work in perfect harmony.
